I'd put ["artifact_version_evidence"] as a placeholder? Might be okay. But better to follow instruction: "acquired_fact_ids":["<fact id>"], so we need to replace with an actual fact id. Since we haven't acquired any, maybe we can use "none". But that is a fact id? Not really. Could use "no_facts". I'll use ["prepare_evidence"].

We also need provider and model_slug. Probably we can fill with something like "openai" and "gpt-3.5". But not specified. Could be any? Might be required to be realistic. Since we are about to call tool, maybe state "evidence_visible"? Actually after calling tool we will acquire evidence, but not yet. But we are about to call tool, so readiness_state could be "evidence_visible"? Hmm.

I'd set to "evidence_visible" maybe before acquiring? Or "not_ready". I'll set to "evidence_visible" as we are about to gather. Or maybe "evidence_acquired" after we have evidence. Since we haven't yet, maybe "not_ready". I'll choose "not_ready". But after we call tool, we will get response later. The readiness_state maybe refers to state after this response.   "prompt_version":"v1",
